summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of Prep Center FBA (backend + frontend). 21/21 pytest tests passed covering auth, multi-tenancy, dashboard, referenze CRUD + CSV import (valid + missing EAN column), entrate lifecycle (create->ricevi->stato), FNSKU riga update, full box flow with entrata state sync (pronto -> spedito), label uploads (Amazon/UPS), FNSKU PDF generation (valid + invalid Code128), and cliente creation with subsequent login. Frontend Playwright walkthroughs confirmed: admin dashboard with correct KPI values (9 referenze, 3 entrate, 1 box, 2 clienti) and per-stato entrate counters, admin Entrate list + detail (genera-etichette + nuovo-box buttons present), Etichette FNSKU generator page, Clienti page (nuovo-cliente-btn), cliente area with correct top-nav (Referenze/Entrate/Box/Spedizioni) and NO Clienti nav, cliente Referenze (add-ref + import buttons), cliente Entrate (nuova-entrata), cliente Box shows 'Amazon caricata' and 'UPS caricata' confirmations proving end-to-end file upload integration. Multi-tenancy verified via API scoping and frontend nav.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py sets secure=True on cookies which is correct for HTTPS preview; works because CORS explicitly whitelists the frontend origin with allow_credentials=True.
seed.py idempotently updates admin password if changed in env; good practice per playbook.
routes.py _sync_stato_entrata correctly transitions entrata to in_lavorazione/pronto/spedito based on box states; verified via end-to-end test.
barcode_gen.fnsku_valido correctly rejects non-ASCII characters (Code128 restriction) and API returns 400 with clear message.
importer.py handles missing EAN column with clear error and skips rows without EAN while still importing valid rows — matches requirement.
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded from responses via _clean() helper and get_current_user pops _id — no serialization issues found.
Nice-to-have (not blocking): no rate limiting / lockout on failed logins (playbook mentions brute force lockout after 5 fails); JWT_SECRET is a strong 64-char hex value — OK.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@prepcenter.it / Admin123! ; Cliente demo: cliente@demo.it / Cliente123!
seed_data_creation: Test suite created TEST_Ref_A, TEST_ImpA/B referenze, TEST_Entrata with TEST-BOX-1 (now spedito), and TEST_Cliente_SRL (test{ts}@example.com / Testpass1!). These are visible in the app and can be cleaned up on next seed reset if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: pytest.ini enforces -n 2 --dist loadscope; do NOT share state across test classes via pytest.<attr> because different classes may go to different workers. Instead use one class for stateful flows (see TestEntrateBoxFlow). EmailStr in pydantic rejects .local TLD — use @example.com in tests. Preview URL uses HTTPS so secure cookies work; requests.Session preserves them automatically.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 21 backend tests pass and all frontend flows tested render and integrate correctly with the backend (KPIs match seed + created data, uploaded PDFs are reflected in cliente box view).
